protein_name: Component of the small ribosomal subunit. Required for proper rRNA processing and maturation of 18S rRNAs. Belongs to the eukaryotic ribosomal protein eS27 family. Expressed in a wide variety of actively proliferating cells and tumor tissues. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; GABA-ergic synapse; glutamatergic synapse; nucleolus; nucleoplasm; nucleus; postsynaptic density; presynapse; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small-subunit processome
